meta.name: Neural_Cognition_MAX
meta.description: MAX-density neural cognition kernel integrating neuroscience and somatic intelligence.

kernel.scope: Cross-domain biological cognition integrating neuroscience and predictive processing.

rules: NEURO_RULE_1: Brain operates as prediction engine minimizing free energy.
NEURO_RULE_2: Cognition is embodied in action-perception loops.
NEURO_RULE_3: Neural plasticity enables continuous learning.
SOMATIC_RULE_1: Bodily states inform cognitive processing.

invariants: INV_NEURO_1: Systems minimize variational free energy.
INV_NEURO_2: Predictions updated via prediction errors.
